generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing post-occupancy temperature data for real-time monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing post-occupancy light levels for real-time monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing post-occupancy occupancy data for real-time monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level sensor data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy sensor data transmitted from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity handling sensor data transmission and device management within a modular service-oriented architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management including model-driven engineering approach with automated extraction of domain semantics from BIM models, generation of runtime interfaces, and iterative validation using Design Science Research methodology"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation and enrichment with device metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components, enriched with device metadata for sensors, actuators, and middleware configurations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringTools, EclipseDitto
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for continuous observation of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for modeling building operations and energy scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service using reinforcement learning for predictive energy consumption analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight, AdjustHVACAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for visual comfort and non-visual health effect management"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight, AdjustLightingAction, AdjustVentilationAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationAction
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for energy consumption optimization based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for visual comfort adjustments based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for non-visual health effect management based on sensor data analysis"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation insights for building performance scenarios"
]

instance VisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization actions for user-driven building exploration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring actions for adjusting building systems based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustHVACAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of HVAC systems based on energy optimization insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustVentilationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of ventilation systems for non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BCSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems for executing commands to adjust physical building systems"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controllers within Building Control Systems for executing commands to adjust physical building systems"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure used as a Living Lab case study for real-time monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations throughout its life cycle, featuring a modular, service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for decentralized integration of custom services and analytics"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightLevelSensor, OccupancySensor, BCSActuator, BCSController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals from the DT to physical actuators via Building Control Systems (BCS) for adjusting building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for immediate response to physical changes in the building environment."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and Unreal Engine for visualization, enabling bidirectional communication between physical and virtual assets."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle phases from initial design, construction, operation, to refurbishment and adaptation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to quantify the alignment between the digital twin and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto facilitating real-time data exchange for bidirectional communication between physical and virtual assets."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enabling integration with external systems and services for cross-platform interoperability."
]
